title: Edge Validation Report — Randomness vs Skill (FTD-056-ODYSSEY)

methodology.note: Bootstrap 90% CI: if lower bound > 1.0 then PF > 1.0 with 95% confidence. Binomial z-score tests WR vs 50% null. Neither test requires normality.
